name: ATM (DeLaval)
answerBox: Centrifuge World repairs and rebuilds ATM (DeLaval) decanter and basket centrifuges. As an independent specialist since 1939, we inspect, recondition, weld, refit wear parts, balance, and test-run these machines at our Houston and Chicago shops, and fabricate hard-to-find parts to keep your process running.
intro: ATM and DeLaval decanter and basket centrifuges serve dewatering, clarification, and solids-handling duties across a range of industries. Centrifuge World is an independent shop that inspects, rebuilds, and returns these machines to peak performance, backed by in-house parts fabrication when OEM stock runs long.
disclosure: Centrifuge World is an independent repair and rebuild specialist. We are not affiliated with ATM (DeLaval).

capabilities.detail: Non-destructive testing and inspection (NDTI) of your DeLaval/ATM decanter or basket centrifuge, followed by a written condition report and recommended repair plan.
Comprehensive reconditioning of decanter and basket machines to restore high efficiency and reduce process downtime.
Repair of areas damaged by mechanical, chemical, or erosion attack.
Refitting of wear parts such as o-rings and gaskets, plus replacement of worn or damaged items.
Static and dynamic balancing based on need, followed by a test run before return.
Reverse-engineering and in-house fabrication of hard-to-find DeLaval/ATM parts, with turnaround in a few days.

body: Centrifuge World offers a full range of services to enhance the performance of DeLaval/ATM decanter and basket centrifuge equipment. Work is performed at our service centers in Houston, Texas and Chicago, Illinois, where our engineers begin with a non-destructive testing and inspection and then build the right plan to rebuild your machine.

Getting an inspection is easy. Call us to schedule it, load the centrifuge onto the truck we dispatch, and our driver delivers it to our shop for a comprehensive NDTI. Afterward you receive a detailed report with the recommended services and a list of the parts needed to complete the repairs. Once you approve the quote, we execute the work and return the machine in top condition, operating at peak performance.

Our repair scope covers standard maintenance when field service is not convenient, welding of areas damaged by mechanical, chemical, or erosion attack, refitting of wear parts such as o-rings and gaskets, replacement of worn or damaged items, equipment upgrades, static and dynamic balancing, and a full test run before shipment.

We keep a large inventory of parts for DeLaval/ATM centrifuges, and when a part is hard to find or facing a long backlog we have the knowledge to reverse-engineer it and the equipment to fabricate it, often turning it around in just a few days so your rebuild stays on schedule.

faqs.question: Who repairs ATM (DeLaval) centrifuges?
faqs.answer: Centrifuge World, an independent centrifuge repair and rebuild specialist operating since 1939. We service DeLaval/ATM decanter and basket centrifuges at our Houston and Chicago facilities and are not affiliated with DeLaval.

faqs.question: Do you service both DeLaval decanters and basket centrifuges?
faqs.answer: Yes. We recondition and rebuild both DeLaval/ATM decanter and basket machines, including inspection, welding, wear-part refitting, balancing, and a test run before the unit is returned to your plant.

faqs.question: What happens after my DeLaval/ATM centrifuge is inspected?
faqs.answer: After our non-destructive testing and inspection you receive a detailed report with recommended services and a parts list. Once you approve the quote, we complete the repairs and return the machine in top condition at peak performance.
